title: Shared action tableau core
notes: Universal verbs used across every arcana scenario. The Gauntlet keeps the four non-violent Final Girl starters (Walk, Focus, Search, Short Rest) and adds general-purpose verbs (Distraction, Guard, Close Call, Spend It, Improvise). The two violent FG starters (Weak Attack, Furious Strike) are dropped — the Fool isn't a fighter, and most arcana operate in the same register. If a future arcana needs combat, its box can add its own.

cards.title: WALK
cards.failure: Move up to 1 space, lose 1 Time.

cards.title: FOCUS
cards.double_success: Reduce Threshold roll cost by 2 next card; draw +1 Time.
cards.single_success: Reduce Threshold roll cost by 1 next card.

cards.title: SEARCH
cards.double_success: Look at top 2 of the current Item deck, take 1.
cards.single_success: Take the top of the current Item deck.

cards.title: SPRINT
cards.single_success: Move up to 2 spaces, lose 1 Time.
cards.failure: Move up to 1 space, lose 2 Time.

cards.title: DISTRACTION
cards.double_success: Cancel the top Gravity card; move 1 space.

cards.title: GUARD
cards.double_success: Ignore the next Inertia tick from the next Gravity card; move 1 space.
cards.single_success: Ignore the next Inertia tick from the next Gravity card.

cards.title: SPEND IT
cards.passive_effect: Discard this card for +1 Time. Always playable.

cards.title: IMPROVISE
cards.double_success: Replay the last Action card played this turn.
cards.single_success: Replay the last Action card at the result you just rolled.
